What entities are present on the table and how are they arranged?
canonical_answer: A white plastic bag labeled "Shur Fine Seasoned Taters" rests on a brown wooden table surface. Beside the packaging, a white ceramic plate with a blue rim contains golden-brown tater tots covered in red sauce. A metal spoon lies on the plate among the food items. A hand holds and tilts the bag slightly.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a white plastic bag and a bowl with a spoon sit on a wooden table; at 8s, a metal fork rests on the plate containing red sauce instead of the spoon; at 10s, a hand with light skin tone holds up the bag labeled Seasoned Taters; at 12s, the nutrition facts and Shur Fine logo text are displayed on the package.
